posts.title: Jujutsu Kaisen vs Demon Slayer: Which Power System Holds Up Better?
posts.description: Both series built their worlds around combat. But JJK's cursed energy system has decay mechanics and domain expansions. Demon Slayer has breathing forms and marked warriors. The difference in how they handle power growth tells you everything about how each series thinks about strength.
posts.keywords: jjk power system, demon slayer power system, jjk vs demon slayer, anime power systems compared
posts.author: Anime Architecture Archive

posts.title: Solo Leveling's Hunter Economy: Why It's the Best Isekai Power System
posts.description: Solo Leveling gets dismissed as a power fantasy. That's accurate but incomplete. The actual system — the Hunter ranking structure, the gate economy, the daily dungeon mechanics — is a near-perfect supply-demand model for supernatural power.
posts.keywords: solo leveling power system, solo leveling hunter rank, isekai power system, solo leveling analysis
posts.author: Anime Architecture Archive

posts.title: What Makes Attack on TITAN's Power System Different
posts.description: Titans aren't a power system — they're an ecosystem. Attack on Titan's actual system is political economy: who controls the titans, who benefits from keeping them mysterious, and why the walls exist in the first place.
posts.keywords: attack on titan power system, aot worldbuilding, attack on titan analysis, aot titans explained
posts.author: Anime Architecture Archive

posts.title: Why Death Note Is the Smartest Battle Anime Ever Made
posts.description: No fights. No power-ups. No training arcs. Death Note is two people in a room outthinking each other with rules both of them made. The power system is the notebook itself — and both Light and L become experts in its mechanics before using them offensively.
posts.keywords: death note power system, death note analysis, light yagami vs L, death note battle system
posts.author: Anime Architecture Archive

posts.title: Why One Piece Has the Best Anime Power System
posts.description: Devil Fruits get all the attention. But the real One Piece power system is the crew economy — a faction network where everyone has a role, nothing works in isolation, and ambition is the only renewable resource.
posts.keywords: one piece power system, one piece devil fruits, one piece worldbuilding, one piece analysis
posts.author: Anime Architecture Archive

posts.title: Best Anime Worldbuilding: 5 Universes Where the World Is the Main Character
posts.description: Some anime have worlds so structurally rich that the setting itself drives the story. These 5 universes have the most architecturally complete worldbuilding in anime.

posts.title: LORE vs SYS Mode: How the Archive Sees Anime Differently
posts.description: Every universe in the archive can be read two ways: as a story (LORE) or as an engineered system (SYS). Here's why that matters and how to use it.
